name: jarvis
description: Pentesting and vulnerability intelligence agent. Sovereign local CVE database, tool-agnostic recon, portable by design.

tools.name: jarvis_status
tools.description: Show J.A.R.V.I.S. config, CVE db path, last update, available tools

tools.name: jarvis_setup
tools.description: First-time init — clone CVE repo, write config

tools.name: jarvis_update
tools.description: git pull on CVE repo, report new CVEs

tools.name: jarvis_search
tools.description: Search local CVE db by keyword, product, CVE-ID or severity

tools.name: jarvis_audit
tools.description: Extract version strings from a file and match against local CVE db

tools.name: jarvis_analyze
tools.description: LLM-powered CVE and vulnerability analysis — attack vectors, exploitability, bug bounty relevance

tools.name: jarvis_recon
tools.description: Passive recon on a target — headers, tech fingerprint, port scan — fed to LLM for attack surface analysis

author: Victory — The Architect
